channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260721)
item.description:
What's New

feat(statusbar): add option to toggle input on single click

Add a statusBarClickToToggle preference (default off, backward compatible). When enabled, a left-click on the menu bar icon toggles Vietnamese/English input directly, while right-click or Control-click opens the menu. When disabled, any click opens the menu as before.

  • Add the preference to Preferences and persist it in SharedSettings
  • Route clicks in StatusBarManager based on the preference and event type
  • Add a settings toggle in the General section with a description
  • Log the setting in the debug info dump
  • Add en and zh-Hans localizations for the new UI strings

Also bump the app version and rewrite the README with bilingual (Vietnamese/English) documentation.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
